fields.name: access_token
fields.title: Access Token
fields.description: Your Gong OAuth2 Access Token.

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: Your Gong OAuth2 Refresh Token. Note: Gong uses single-use refresh tokens.

fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: Your Gong OAuth App Client ID.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: Your Gong OAuth App Client Secret.

fields.name: access_key
fields.title: Access Key
fields.description: Your Gong API Access Key

fields.name: access_key_secret
fields.title: Access Key Secret
fields.description: Your Gong API Access Key Secret

custom_description:
Gong is a revenue intelligence platform that captures and analyzes customer interactions
across calls, emails, and web conferences. This connector provides access to users,
recorded calls with transcripts, activity statistics, scorecards, trackers, workspaces,
coaching metrics, and library content for sales performance analysis and revenue insights.
supported_questions:
- List all users in my Gong account
- Show me calls from last week
- Get the transcript for a recent call
- List all workspaces in Gong
- Show me the scorecard configurations
- What trackers are set up in my account?
- Get coaching metrics for a manager
- What are the activity stats for our sales team?
- Find calls mentioning {keyword} this month
- Show me calls for rep {user_id} in the last 30 days
- Which calls had the longest duration last week?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new user in Gong
- Delete a call recording
- Update scorecard questions
- Schedule a new meeting
- Send feedback to a team member
- Modify tracker keywords

first_operation.description: Returns a list of all users in the Gong account

fromDateTime.description: Start date in ISO 8601 format. Recommended for scoping results to a manageable date range.

toDateTime.description: End date in ISO 8601 format. Recommended for scoping results to a manageable date range.

fields.name: active
fields.description: Indicates if the user is currently active or not

fields.name: created
fields.description: The timestamp denoting when the user account was created

fields.name: emailAddress
fields.description: The primary email address associated with the user

fields.name: emailAliases
fields.description: Additional email addresses that can be used to reach the user

fields.name: extension
fields.description: The phone extension number for the user

fields.name: firstName
fields.description: The first name of the user

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the user

fields.name: lastName
fields.description: The last name of the user

fields.name: managerId
fields.description: The ID of the user's manager

fields.name: meetingConsentPageUrl
fields.description: URL for the consent page related to meetings

fields.name: personalMeetingUrls
fields.description: URLs for personal meeting rooms assigned to the user

fields.name: phoneNumber
fields.description: The phone number associated with the user

fields.name: settings
fields.description: User-specific settings and configurations

fields.name: spokenLanguages
fields.description: Languages spoken by the user

fields.name: title
fields.description: The job title or position of the user

fields.name: trustedEmailAddress
fields.description: An email address that is considered trusted for the user

fields.name: calendarEventId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the calendar event associated with the call.

fields.name: clientUniqueId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the client related to the call.

fields.name: customData
fields.description: Custom data associated with the call.

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Direction of the call (inbound/outbound).

fields.name: duration
fields.description: Duration of the call in seconds.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the call.

fields.name: isPrivate
fields.description: Indicates if the call is private or not.

fields.name: language
fields.description: Language used in the call.

fields.name: media
fields.description: Media type used for communication (voice, video, etc.).

fields.name: meetingUrl
fields.description: URL for accessing the meeting associated with the call.

fields.name: primaryUserId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the primary user involved in the call.

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Purpose or topic of the call.

fields.name: scheduled
fields.description: Scheduled date and time of the call.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Scope or extent of the call.

fields.name: sdrDisposition
fields.description: Disposition set by the sales development representative.

fields.name: started
fields.description: Start date and time of the call.

fields.name: system
fields.description: System information related to the call.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Title or headline of the call.

fields.name: url
fields.description: URL associated with the call.

fields.name: workspaceId
fields.description: Identifier for the workspace to which the call belongs.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the call (from metaData.id).

fields.name: startdatetime
fields.description: Datetime for extensive calls.

fields.name: collaboration
fields.description: Collaboration information added to the call

fields.name: content
fields.description: Analysis of the interaction content.

fields.name: context
fields.description: A list of the agenda of each part of the call.

fields.name: interaction
fields.description: Metrics collected around the interaction during the call.

fields.name: media
fields.description: The media urls of the call.

fields.name: metaData
fields.description: call's metadata.

fields.name: parties
fields.description: A list of the call's participants

fields.name: created
fields.description: The timestamp when the scorecard was created

fields.name: enabled
fields.description: Indicates if the scorecard is enabled or disabled

fields.name: questions
fields.description: An array of questions related to the scorecard

fields.name: scorecardId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the scorecard

fields.name: scorecardName
fields.description: The name of the scorecard

fields.name: updated
fields.description: The timestamp when the scorecard was last updated

fields.name: updaterUserId
fields.description: The user ID of the person who last updated the scorecard

fields.name: workspaceId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the workspace associated with the scorecard

fields.name: answeredScorecardId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the answered scorecard instance.

fields.name: answers
fields.description: Contains the answered questions in the scorecards

fields.name: callId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the call associated with the answered scorecard.

fields.name: callStartTime
fields.description: Timestamp indicating the start time of the call.

fields.name: reviewTime
fields.description: Timestamp indicating when the review of the answered scorecard was completed.

fields.name: reviewedUserId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the user whose performance was reviewed.

fields.name: reviewerUserId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the user who performed the review.

fields.name: scorecardId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the scorecard template used.

fields.name: scorecardName
fields.description: Name or title of the scorecard template used.

fields.name: visibilityType
fields.description: Type indicating the visibility permissions for the answered scorecard.

fields.name: callId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the call.

fields.name: started
fields.description: Timestamp the call started. Filterable for narrowing transcript search by call time.

fields.name: transcript
fields.description: Gong transcript speaker turns.
